reach_why: Extends familiar AI oversight skepticism, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Connects benchmark elegance, human oversight, and evaluator stability into a sharper critique of self-judging AI.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable empirically, but key claims about justified handoff and stability remain underspecified.
explanation: Clean benchmarks can mislead; without stable evaluation, AI self-judgment lacks justified trust.
